title: llm.transcribe
description: Speech-to-text through the STT router (explicit provider > STT_LANGUAGE_ROUTES > DEFAULT_STT_PROVIDER + STT_FALLBACK_CHAIN; fallback only on retryable failure). comm carries URLs only, never raw audio bytes. Returns {status: 'ok', transcript: NormalizedTranscript, provider_used: string, fallback_used: boolean} or {status: 'failure', reason: string}.

diarization.description: Ask the provider for speaker labels.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard cap on one provider's submit+poll cycle.

keyterms.description: Normalized vocabulary-bias terms (plain strings, no weight syntax). Adapters map them onto their provider's biasing parameter; per-provider limits truncate (counted in the transcript's biasing block), never fail.

provider_options.description: Free-form per-provider passthrough, applied AFTER the adapter's own request params — pin provider specifics without a core release. Unknown keys go to the provider as-is.
